Video.summary: The team from Wired2Fish delivers the goods on how to catch the biggest fish—wherever or whenever you're casting lines.
Video.grandparentTitle: Wired2Fish | Baits and Gear For the Biggest Catch
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: The Lindner team takes viewers to the best locations for the biggest fish.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Angling legend Jimmy Houston takes us on his most successful trips with big fish and hilarious antics.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Jim shows how effective the drop shot can be on Bass during the extreme heat of Summer.
Video.grandparentTitle: Jim Crowley Outdoors | When its Hot... Drop Shot!.mp4
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Fishing legend Hank Parker take viewers to the most secluded locations for the biggest fish.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Learn the best gear and strategies to target the biggest fish in the pre-spawn spring angling season.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Join us on an exhilarating journey deep into the heart of Northern Ontario as we tackle mid-summer walleye fishing like never before! Guided by the rising sun, we gear up with our Polaris Ranger to access a remote lake for a day filled with fishing action and good times. Joining the adventure is Mercury Canada Marketing Manager Cameron Racine, adding expertise and excitement to this unforgettable outing. Don't miss the fun, the fish, and the breathtaking scenery!
Video.grandparentTitle: FishON! | Northern Adventures: Mid-Summer Walleye Quest with Cameron Racine from Mercury Canada
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Venice Adventure
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Lunker redfish put tackle to the test on jetties of the Mississippi River Delta in Louisiana.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Brent Chapmans Pro vs Joe-Rod's Honey Hole
Video.grandparentTitle: Pro vs Joe - Rod's Honey Hole
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Brent Chapmans Pro vs Joe- Heads up at Live Oak
Video.grandparentTitle: Pro vs Joe - Heads up at Live Oak
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Some of the most incredible parts of fishing includes traveling to new destinations, making new friends, and catching new fish. Shea McIntee and the crew travel north to Santa Barbra and jump on board the 58-foot charter boat, the Coral Sea. We get extra lucky because mother nature allows us to travel up the coastline into a territory that most people don't get the opportunity to fish.
Video.grandparentTitle: Stoked on Fishing - Full Speed Rock Fishing on the Coral Sea
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Join us as we head to Frederick House Lake in Connaught, Ontario, just east of Timmins. With a narrow window of opportunity before the weather closes in, we reel in some fantastic walleye, sauger, and other exciting species. It's all about adapting to the elements and making the most of the moment!
Video.grandparentTitle: FishON! | Storm’s Edge Success: Fishing Frederick House Lake
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Paul and Ray return to a remote Northern Ontario lake for the final shoot of the season. Facing a tricky beaver dam crossing, they bring in Dan and Ben for extra hands and safety. The day delivers incredible walleye and bass action, capped off with a shore lunch featuring perfectly seasoned walleye courtesy of Outdoor Flavours.
Video.grandparentTitle: Remote Lakes, Big Fish, Epic Days
Video.title: FishON | Last Cast Walleye Pursuit

Video.summary: Join us for this episode where one of our local anglers, catches a personal best Walleye
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Remote Northern Wilderness, Smallmouth Bass Fishing part 2
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Tournament veteran and fishing guide, Art Ferguson accompanies Kim in the Orlando area, in search of giant pre-spawn Florida largemouth. However, the two experience a baffling conundrum, which Kim documents from beneath the water's surface.
Video.grandparentTitle: Hook 'n Look — Which Way Did They Go?
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Charter boat captain Mike Macko recounts his grueling life in the engine room aboard a U.S. Navy ship in the South Pacific theatre.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Shea McIntee and the crew head down to one of our all-time favorite offshore fishing destinations, Madalena Bay, Mexico, to fish with Mag Bay Lodge for Marlin and other pelagic fish.
Video.grandparentTitle: Stoked on Fishing - The Magdalena Bay Experience
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: James Lindner and Billy Rosner chase walleyes and more on Minnesota's vast Lake Vermilion while discussing the merits of a family sport called fishing.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: If you've never been to Alaska, it is an absolute must-see. Alaska is amazingly unique. If you have been there before, you know what we are talking about. Last week Shea McIntee and the crew settled in at Alaskan Anglers Inn, headed out fishing, and hooked onto their personal best halibut. This week Stoked on fishing heats up with round two, getting into some solid Halibut and Black Bass, finish the day winding down with a delicious dinner and some jacuzzi time. Stoked on Alaska. Here we go!
Video.title: Stoked on Fishing — Back to Gustavus Alaska, Pt. 2

Image.alt: Stoked on Fishing — Back to Gustavus Alaska, Pt. 2
Stoked on Fishing — Back to Gustavus Alaska, Pt. 2
Stoked on Fishing — Back to Gustavus Alaska, Pt. 2

Video.summary: The night bite in Sturgeon Bay is on fire! In this week's episode, we’re meeting with our good friends Lonney Goman from Greenbay Trophy Fishing and Scott Meiller from Rebel Converting to catch some walleye. Hold onto your hineys folks, this will be a long night!
Video.title: Night Fishing Walleye

Video.summary: Larry takes us on the clear waters of Lake Michigan for some amazing salmon fishing.
Video.title: Charter Boating Milwaukee

Video.summary: On today's episode of AnglingBuzz TV, we're talking all about finding walleye and how to catch them! Our special guest is Jason Freed who's a fishing guide on Minnesota's famous Leech Lake.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Fishing can be very high-tech, but on the other end of the spectrum, it can actually be very simple. Today we're going to show you some presentations and tactics to put fish in the boat....easily!
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Jim shows you, in detail how to build your own Ned Rig rod.
Video.grandparentTitle: Angler's Workshop | Building A Ned Rig Rod
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Dustin explains the lures and locations to best catch post-spawn bass.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Jim explains how to build one of the most effective baits for bass.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: We're returning to one of our all-time favorite destinations in Baja, Mexico - Cedros Island, with Jose and Cedros Outdoor Adventures. People often ask us, 'Why do you return to Cedros Island?' The answer is straightforward: the fishing is absolutely ridiculous almost every single time. Our Stoked on Fishing charter makes a point of showing up in the middle of October for a reason. That reason? It's all about the variety of species available to catch, starting with yellowfin tuna, dorado, halibut, and the elusive Mr. Yellowtail. It's game time - let's go fishing in Baja!
Video.grandparentTitle: Stoked on Fishing | Cedros Island Goes Off, Part Two
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Dusitn takes on classic Fall conditions explaining the best ways to approach bass throughout the day.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Jim talks with DIY Lure guy Jerry Skates about how to make your own plastic lures for Bass fishing.
Video.title: Episode 1
